result.summary: Frontend Astro project scaffolded successfully. Created package.json with Astro 4, React, Tailwind. Created astro.config.mjs, tailwind.config.cjs with Pacman dark theme (yellow/red/pink/cyan/orange accents). Created BaseLayout.astro with responsive nav, dark theme, footer. Created index.astro landing page with hero section, 5 language cards, CTA buttons. Created global.css with Tailwind directives and chomp animation. Build verified: `npx astro build` completes with 0 errors, 1 page generated in 670ms.
